feed.title: Your site title — Bookshelf
feed.subtitle: Books that earned a permanent spot.

entry.title: A novel
entry.summary: What it does to you. Notes can be one sentence; resist the urge to summarise.

entry.title: A book about craft
entry.summary: Why it earned a permanent spot. /bookshelf/ groups by section — match the section value across files to put books in the same group.

entry.title: A book about working
entry.summary: What it teaches. Sections render in the order they first appear in the file numbering, so 01- determines section order.

entry.title: A book of essays
entry.summary: Why it stays on the shelf. Older books are welcome — the year is just for context.
